hero.subtitle: Celebrating Bangladesh-China friendship through quality Chinese language education. Join thousands of successful students who have mastered Mandarin with us.

courses.title: Our Courses
courses.subtitle: Comprehensive Chinese language programs designed for all levels and goals

communicative.title: Communicative Chinese Course
communicative.description: Master everyday Chinese conversation with practical speaking skills. Perfect for beginners wanting to communicate confidently.

hsk4.title: HSK-4 Preparation Course
hsk4.description: Intensive preparation for HSK Level 4 certification. Covers all required vocabulary, grammar, and exam strategies.

crazy.title: Crazy Chinese Course
crazy.description: Accelerated immersive learning for fast results. Ideal for motivated learners who want rapid progress.

evening.title: Evening Chinese Course
evening.description: Flexible evening classes for working professionals. Learn Chinese without disrupting your work schedule.

online.title: Online Chinese Course
online.description: Learn from anywhere with our interactive online platform. Live classes with experienced teachers.

children.title: Children's Chinese Course
children.description: Fun and engaging Chinese lessons designed for young learners aged 6-15. Games, songs, and interactive activities.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Building bridges between Bangladesh and China through language education
about.description: Established on January 1, 2016, Yidai Yilu Chinese Institute has been at the forefront of Chinese language education in Bangladesh. We are proud to be affiliated with the Bangladesh Technical Education Board (Affiliation No. 50803).
about.mission: Our mission is to foster cultural exchange and economic cooperation between Bangladesh and China by providing world-class Chinese language education. As the Belt and Road Initiative strengthens ties between our nations, the demand for Chinese language skills continues to grow.
